name: session-pins
description: Pin editable instructions and live files into every prompt of a Copilot CLI session. Adds a /pin command and agent-callable pin tools.
postInstallMessage: session-pins installed. The /pin command and pin tools load automatically — no activation step needed. Relaunch Copilot (or start a new session) so the extension loads, then use /pin or just ask Copilot to pin an instruction or file. Requires Copilot CLI 1.0.74 or newer.
